alpha_transparency: true alpha PNG; no checkerboard background; alpha mask is identical across all frames in each folder

folders.cropped_same_frame: Use these as individual head-only sprites. All frames are the exact same size and the head stays in the same position.
folders.aligned_full_canvas: Use these if you want to drop the head frames over the original full-body split with no position adjustment.
folders.spritesheets: Transparent 4x4 spritesheets. Cell size equals the frame dimensions listed above.
folders.preview: Contact sheet preview on dark background only; not intended as a transparent game asset.
